text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 
26 
FIBRO_MEDICARE 
LABEL: 
Fibromyalgia, Chronic Pain and Fatigue End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only Claims 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for fibromyalgia, chronic pain, 
and fatigue as of the end of the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: FIBRO_MEDICARE 
LONG NAME: FIBRO_MEDICARE 
TYPE:
